changed_files.diff_summary: Refactored from 792 lines to 112 lines. Removed inline logic and JSX, now uses useMenuBarData, useAutoRefresh, useWindowResize hooks and MenuBarHeader, MenuBarContent, MenuBarActions subcomponents.

Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-accent-blue) -> text-macos-blue, var(--color-muted-foreground) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-glass-hover) -> bg-accent, var(--color-text-hint) -> text-muted-foreground/50

Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-macos-orange) -> text-macos-orange, var(--color-accent-blue) -> text-macos-blue, var(--color-macos-green) -> text-macos-green, var(--color-glass-muted) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-glass-hover) -> bg-accent

Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-glass-hover) -> bg-accent, var(--color-glass-border) -> border-border, var(--color-text-hint) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-glass-muted) -> text-muted-foreground/40

Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-success) -> bg-macos-green, var(--color-muted-foreground) -> bg-muted-foreground, var(--color-text-hint) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-glass-muted) -> text-muted-foreground/40

Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-glass-accent) -> bg-macos-blue, var(--color-text-hint) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-glass-hover) -> bg-accent, var(--color-glass-border) -> border-border
Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-glass-border) -> border-border, var(--color-glass-accent) -> bg-macos-blue, text-white -> text-primary-foreground

Replaced CSS variables with Tailwind classes: var(--color-glass-muted) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-text-hint) -> text-muted-foreground, var(--color-glass-hover) -> bg-accent, var(--color-glass-border) -> border-border
